title: Westland Organic Chicken Manure Pellets 2.25Kg + 25% Extra Free 2.82Kg (20100421)
description: Product description Westland Organic Chicken Manure Pellets are an ideal way to enrich and condition your soil. Use all around the garden when planting and feeding established plants. Made from 100% composted manure and naturally processed, this effective non-chemical fertiliser is rich in organic matter and the nutrients your plant need for healthy growth. Directions Spread the Westland Organic Chicken Manure Pellets around the garden while planting and feeding established plants. Safety Warning Use gloves and avoid contact with skin and eyes. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and open flames. Do not apply in windy conditions to avoid drift and potential harm to nearby plants or animals. See more
